mapper.sql: select a.alarm_id, a.node_id, n.node_name, a.reading_id, a.metric_code, a.metric_name, a.alarm_level, a.direction, a.actual_value, a.threshold_value, a.alarm_message, a.status, a.alarm_time, a.handle_by, a.handle_time, a.create_time from agri_alarm_record a left join agri_sensor_node n on a.node_id = n.node_id and n.del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select count(*) from agri_alarm_record where status = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into agri_alarm_record ( node_id, reading_id, metric_code, metric_name, alarm_level, direction, actual_value, threshold_value, alarm_message, status, alarm_time, create_time ) values ( #{nodeId}, #{readingId}, #{metricCode}, #{metricName}, #{alarmLevel}, #{direction}, #{actualValue}, #{thresholdValue}, #{alarmMessage}, #{status}, #{alarmTime}, sysdate() )
